items.title: ERP rollout for a mid-size manufacturer
items.summary: Finance, inventory, and production were living in seventeen spreadsheets. We built an ERP around their actual flow — from raw material intake to dispatch — and migrated five years of records.

items.title: E-commerce platform for a specialty retailer
items.summary: A growing retailer was losing buyers at checkout and overselling stock they didn't have. New storefront, live warehouse sync, and a checkout rebuilt around fewer decisions.

items.title: LMS deployment for a training institute
items.summary: Three thousand students, paper registers, and exam results compiled by hand. Acmevia LMS went live in six weeks — white-labelled, with online exams and automated grading.

items.title: DMS + Mobile POS for an FMCG distributor
items.summary: Forty routes, two hundred agents, and stock counts that never matched. Field agents got a mobile POS; management got a dashboard that updates by the second.

items.title: Space management for a university campus
items.summary: Ninety bookable spaces managed through a shared inbox. The booking system replaced it with one calendar, approval routing, and utilization reports the estates team runs monthly.

items.title: Dispatch app for a logistics operator
items.summary: Dispatchers coordinated drivers by phone call and printed manifests. A driver app with live job queues and proof-of-delivery replaced the whiteboard.
